offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual submission causes delays in claim processing. We automate the conversion of claim forms into digital submissions instead of manual entry of claim forms into digital systems.
problem: Manual submission of claim forms leads to delays in processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among brokers
try_it: Let users try form scanning and data extraction on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
